_capture_metadata.captured_from: Phi-4-mini-instruct-4bit emission shape per Microsoft model card and vllm-project/vllm#14682
_capture_metadata.purpose: The exact failure pattern: model emits structured tool-call markup as plain content, vLLM's phi4_mini_json parser fails to extract it, tool_calls stays empty. Recovery MUST synthesize structured tool_calls from the leaked text.
